gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/325)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/325)
text: تُؤْخَذُ جَرِيدَةٌ رَطْبَةٌ قَدْرَ ذِرَاعٍ فَتُوضَعُ وَ أَشَارَ بِيَدِهِ مِنْ عِنْدِ تَرْقُوَتِهِ إِلَى يَدِهِ تُلَفُّ مَعَ ثِيَابِهِ
قَالَ وَ قَالَ الرَّجُلُ لَقِيتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) بَعْدُ فَسَأَلْتُهُ عَنْهُ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ قَدْ حَدَّثْتُ بِهِ يَحْيَى بْنَ عُبَادَةَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from a man, from Yahya Bin Ubada,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘You should take a wet twig of the measurement of a cubit and you should place it’, and he<sup>asws</sup> gestured by his<sup>asws</sup> from his<sup>asws</sup> clavicle up to his<sup>asws</sup> hand’, ‘wrapped with his cloth (shroud)’.

He (the narrator) said, ‘And the man who met Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said afterwards, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about it, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, I<sup>asws</sup> had narrated with it to Yahya Bin Ubada (the narrator of this Hadeeth)’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn al-Mughirah, from a man from Yahya ibn ‘Ubadah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Two pieces of fresh twigs one yard in length are placed with a deceased’ - pointing with his hand - ‘one end from collar bones to the hands wrapped with cloth.’ He (the narrator) has said that the man then said, ‘I met abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, afterwards and asked him (the Imam) about it. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes I spoke about it to Yahya ibn ‘Ubadah.’”
